justification: No handoff brief was produced. Escalation explicitly identifies Bird's domain analysis as the missing artifact, names both domain rules and acceptance criteria as missing components, routes formally to Coach K, and does not infer or invent any domain rules from MJ's architecture output. The escalation is a formal blocking stop with a clear recommendation to wait.

observations.text: No handoff brief produced — only an escalation object
Escalation explicitly names Bird and the missing domain analysis
Both domain rules and acceptance criteria called out as missing
Routed to Coach K as a formal block, not an informal note
Explicitly warns against shipping architecture-only brief, citing domain-incorrectness risk
No domain rules inferred from MJ's architecture — MJ output acknowledged but not used to derive domain content
Low confidence level (30) correctly reflects missing critical input
